name: @memberjunction/external-data-source-oracle
description: Oracle driver for the MemberJunction External Data Sources primitive. Registers a BaseExternalDataSourceDriver implementation via @RegisterClass(BaseExternalDataSourceDriver, 'OracleExternalDriver') using the node-oracledb client (Thin mode — no Instant Client required) for live, read-only proxied access to an external Oracle database.
author: MemberJunction.com
